name: beedoo-qa-tests
description: Testes automatizados para o desafio Beedoo QA

scripts.generate:html: marge cypress/reports/relatorio-merged.json -o cypress/reports/html --reportTitle 'Relatório de Testes - Beedoo QA' --reportPageTitle 'Desafio QA Beedoo' --charts --embeddedScreenshots --inline
scripts.report:complete: npm run clean:reports && npm run cy:run && npm run merge:reports && npm run generate:html
scripts.report:windows: if exist cypress\reports rmdir /s /q cypress\reports && mkdir cypress\reports && npm run cy:run && npm run merge:reports && npm run generate:html
scripts.report:cadastro: npm run clean:reports && cypress run --spec "cypress/e2e/cadastro-curso.cy.js" && npm run merge:reports && npm run generate:html
scripts.report:listagem: npm run clean:reports && cypress run --spec "cypress/e2e/listagem-cursos.cy.js" && npm run merge:reports && npm run generate:html
